string.name: style_prefix
string.value: 32x32 pixel art, ancient Chinese ink wash painting style (水墨画), muted earth tones, transparent background, top-down view, crisp edges, game sprite

string.name: negative_prompt
string.value: blurry, photorealistic, 3d render, text, watermark, signature, human figure, face, body, person, soldier, warrior, photograph, gradient background, anti-aliasing, soft edges

nodes.name: Stability AI - Generate Image
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create an HTTP Header Auth credential with Name='Authorization' and Value='Bearer sk-YOUR-STABILITY-KEY'. Rate limited to 1 request per 1.5s.
